channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens Policies for Lake Victoria Conservation and Economic Use
item.description: The Tanzanian Prime Minister has released detailed instructions concerning the commemoration of Lake Victoria, highlighting the lake’s vital role in the country’s economy and regional significance. La...

item.title: Federico Seneca and His Transformative Impact on Italian Graphic Design
item.description: Federico Seneca (1891–1976) was a pioneering Italian graphic designer whose work redefined advertising in the early 20th century. Serving as art director for companies such as Perugina and Buitoni, Se...

item.title: Ondo APC Members Encouraged to Mobilise for Tinubu’s Second Term
item.description: The Minister of Youth Affairs, Mr Ayo Olawande, don call on all APC members for Ondo State make dem come together to support President Bola Tinubu for re-election come 2027. He talk say youths for sta...

item.title: Bilawal urges Karachi to boost contribution to local defence production amid rising global demand
item.description: Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari on Friday emphasised the need for Karachi to increase its role in Pakistan's defence production sector. Speaking at the inauguration of Kar...

item.title: Kaduna Governor Clears ₦1 Billion Arrears and Allowances for Judiciary Workers
item.description: Kaduna State Governor, Uba Sani, don approve close to ₦1 billion to settle long-standing entitlements for judiciary workers. The fund go cover unpaid salaries for April and May 2021, leave grants for ...

item.title: Stephen Colbert bids farewell as Late Show concludes with star-studded finale
item.description: Stephen Colbert’s final episode of the Late Show concluded with an 80-minute celebration featuring a host of notable guests, including Paul McCartney, Elvis Costello, Bryan Cranston and Tig Notaro. Un...

item.title: Relatives Allege Lawyer Urged Them Not to Attend Hearings on Missing Cockfighters
item.description: Relatives of some missing sabungeros (cockfighters) have spoken out, denying that they initiated any meeting with Atty. Caroline Cruz, the lawyer of businessman Atong Ang. According to reports from '2...

item.title: Australia could establish an AI sovereign wealth fund to benefit the public
item.description: Australia has a unique opportunity to position itself at the forefront of the global AI boom. With tech giants like Microsoft and Anthropic seeking stable locations to train their massive AI models, A...

item.title: Tiger escapes in German town after attacking keeper, prompting police intervention
item.description: In Schkeuditz, a small town near Leipzig airport, a nine-year-old tiger named Sandokan escaped after attacking a 72-year-old keeper in the enclosure of Carmen Zander, a former circus tiger trainer kno...

item.title: Federal Court quashes $421K invoice against Alberta First Nation councillor, allowing her to run in upcoming election
item.description: A Federal Court judge has struck down a $421,000 invoice issued to Councillor Samantha Whalen of the Fort McMurray First Nation (FMFN), which could have prevented her from participating in the upcomin...

item.title: Court Dismisses Suit on Senator Kingibe’s ADC Suspension, Awards Her N20m
item.description: On Friday, di Federal High Court for Abuja don dismiss one case wey some Wuse Ward ADC officials carry go court to validate their indefinite suspension of Senator Ireti Kingibe, wey dey represent the ...

item.title: Parliament and UNISA mark 30 years of South Africa’s Constitution
item.description: Ahead of the 16th Annual Thabo Mbeki Africa Day Lecture in Cape Town, Parliament and UNISA hosted a joint colloquium to commemorate 30 years of South Africa's Constitution. Over 250 participants from ...

item.title: Jim Acosta Requests Compensation Over Past White House Press Pass Dispute
item.description: Jim Acosta, a former CNN anchor, has publicly requested to be considered for compensation following the announcement of a $1.8 billion 'anti-weaponization' fund by the Justice Department under former ...

item.title: Michael Carrick Appointed Permanent Manager of Manchester United After Interim Success
item.description: Manchester United have officially confirmed Michael Carrick as their permanent manager following his interim spell which began in January. Carrick took charge after the club dismissed Ruben Amorim and...

item.title: Senator Zubiri’s father did not participate in Sara Duterte’s impeachment vote, claim debunked
item.description: Several posts on Facebook falsely claimed that former Bukidnon 3rd District Representative Jose Maria “Joe” Zubiri Jr., father of Senator Juan Miguel Zubiri, voted against Vice President Sara Duterte’...

item.title: India Faces Power Shortages Amid Extreme Heat and Rising Electricity Demand
item.description: Parts of India are experiencing persistent power outages as the country faces record-breaking heat and unprecedented electricity demand surpassing 270 gigawatts. The El Niño phenomenon has caused abov...

item.title: Astronomers Investigate Bright Fireball Over New South Wales
item.description: On the evening of 21 May 2026, a spectacular meteor, known as a bolide, exploded in the sky above New South Wales, producing a vivid display visible from Sydney to Canberra. Eyewitnesses reported colo...

item.title: How AI is Transforming Hotel Operations and Guest Experiences
item.description: The hospitality sector is rapidly embracing Artificial Intelligence to enhance guest experiences and operational efficiency. Traditional hotel chains and resorts, which historically relied on personal...

item.title: Personalized Foot Angle Adjustment Reduces Knee Osteoarthritis Pain and Slows Cartilage Damage
item.description: A year-long clinical trial conducted by researchers at the University of Utah, New York University, and Stanford University has shown that small, personalized adjustments to the angle of a person's fo...

item.title: Why Many Nigerians Risk Low Pension Despite Years of Work
item.description: Emeka retire for January 2024 when e reach 60 years old after 27 years work for Lagos logistics company. E dey careful with money and dey contribute to Contributory Pension Scheme (CPS) but when e che...
